signals.headline: House Republicans Advance Haitian Deportation Protection Bill via Discharge Petition** | YES | MED confidence[2]
signals.raw:
House Republicans Advance Haitian Deportation Protection Bill via Discharge Petition** | YES | MED confidence[2]

Six Republicans, including MAGA supporters, joined 212 Democrats and independents to sign a discharge petition, overcoming Speaker Johnson's block and forcing a full House vote on protecting 350,000 Haitians from deportation; the bill is expected to pass[2].
